emails.subject: US Styrene FOB
emails.body: Mark, Attached please find the last version of the Product Description that will go=20 out on the web. You have already oked this language, but just take on last= =20 look at it just in case. Thank you very much, Melba 58986 US Styrene FOB Hou/TX Cty Jul00 USD/Lb-M A US ASTM 2827 Styrene Transaction with Enron Petrochemicals Company, a=20 division of Enron Liquid Fuels, Inc., under which the Seller shall sell and= =20 the Buyer shall purchase the agreed quantity of Styrene at the Contract=20 Price. The commodity will be delivered on a FOB basis upon five- (5) workin= g=20 days notice by Buyer and on a day selected by Buyer between the Effective= =20 Date and the Termination Date. The term of the Transaction shall be from the Effective Date to the=20 Termination Date. The Effective Date is 01 Jul 2000. The Termination Date i= s=20 31 Jul 2000. This transaction is for delivery to either Houston or Texas City at Seller= =01,s=20 election. The price is quoted in US Dollars per unit of volume, which will be the=20 Contractual Currency. The unit of measure against which the price is quoted shall be pounds and t= he=20 volume shown shall be in total number of Metric Tons (2,204 US Pounds) per= =20 month.
